verdict: This is the most uncertain forecast in the framework. Today the job is durable — autonomous trucking pilots are limited to specific corridors and weather. But once Level-4 autonomy scales (likely 2028-2032), this score spikes toward 75+ for long-haul work. Local delivery and specialty driving stay human longer.
timeline_callout: Long-haul interstate routes are the first to automate; local delivery, hazmat, and specialty hauling buy more time.

routine_cognitive.reasoning: Route planning and logistics paperwork are routine; the driving itself is real-time perception.

creative_judgment.reasoning: Edge cases (construction, weather, accidents) require judgment AVs still struggle with.

regulatory_moat.reasoning: CDL licensure required; hours-of-service rules apply. Moat shrinks as autonomous trucks get certified.

embodied_work.reasoning: Driver must be on the truck for current regulations; this assumption is what's changing.

stakes_of_error.reasoning: 80,000-pound vehicles at highway speed — humans stay legally accountable for now.

relationships.reasoning: Some shipper / receiver interaction; mostly solo work.

ai_capability_gap.reasoning: Autonomous tech works in good conditions on geofenced routes; not yet weather-and-edge-case robust.

physical_dexterity.reasoning: Securing loads, inspecting, hooking trailers — varies by sub-specialty.

key_tasks.task: Drive trucks to deliver goods over long distances
key_tasks.note: Provisional — high exposure once autonomy scales, low today on most routes.

key_tasks.task: Inspect vehicle and cargo before and after trips
key_tasks.note: Embodied + regulated; Level-4 systems still need human inspectors.

key_tasks.task: Maintain logs of hours, mileage, and deliveries
Secure cargo and verify paperwork at pickup/delivery

key_tasks.note: Routine comms automatable; exception handling human.

key_tasks.task: Perform minor maintenance and roadside repairs

evidence_ledger.meta: US Dept. of Labor · Updated Jan 2026
evidence_ledger.contribution: Standardized task list — driving + inspection + paperwork mix.
Projects 5% growth — current shortage masks the autonomy threat.
Long-haul trucking among the highest-impact automation cases by total displaced workers.
Truck driver exposure depends heavily on which sub-tasks autonomy can handle.
Driverless freight runs operating on Texas + Arizona corridors with limited weather.

reasoning_steps.title: Score the eight dimensions
reasoning_steps.body: routine_cognitive=5, ai_capability_gap=6, creative_judgment=4, regulatory_moat=5, embodied_work=9, stakes_of_error=9, relationships=3, physical_dexterity=5.

reasoning_steps.title: Calibration check
reasoning_steps.body: Anchor table lists Truck Driver at 50 (provisional, with explicit note that it spikes once autonomy scales). Computed 49 is essentially on the anchor — adopt 50.

reasoning_steps.title: Confidence band
reasoning_steps.body: Low ±18 — autonomy scaling timeline is the dominant uncertainty. Could be 35 in 2030 or 75 in 2032.

adjacent_careers.name: Heavy Equipment Operator
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Construction sites are far from autonomous; embodied + dexterity moat.

adjacent_careers.name: Diesel Mechanic
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Trucks need maintenance whether AVs drive them or not — a great hedge.

adjacent_careers.name: Fleet Manager / Logistics Coordinator
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Operations role that supervises both human and autonomous fleets.

adjacent_careers.name: Local Delivery Driver
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Last-mile + customer interaction is more durable than long-haul.

adjacent_careers.name: Bus / Transit Driver
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Public transit + passenger safety regulations slow autonomy adoption substantially.

action_plan.title: Don't aim only for long-haul if this is your path
action_plan.description: Local, specialty (oversized, hazmat), and trades-adjacent driving have far longer runways.

action_plan.title: Pair driving with a maintenance certification
action_plan.description: Diesel mechanic + CDL is a durable combination — both halves have low AI exposure.

action_plan.title: Watch the autonomous-trucking pilots quarterly
action_plan.description: Aurora and Kodiak public reports tell you whether the timeline is accelerating or slipping. Re-check this analysis annually.

action_plan.title: Get an English / CDL prep course locked in by graduation
action_plan.description: Paid CDL training programs exist — lower-cost path than 4-year college, but verify the school's job placement rate.

follow_up_suggestions.label: What's the realistic timeline for driverless trucks?
